title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
New building in tankers this week, clients of Performance shipping announced contracting two firm 115k dwt LR2s at SWS, with the vessels set for delivery in January and April 2026. Source: Clarkson Platou (Hellas) ltd
